name: Almonds

pros.title: dense texture can make them unusually satiating
pros.explanation: Crunch, fibre, and fat together can help almonds feel more filling than many snack foods calorie for calorie.

pros.title: the skins contribute useful polyphenols
pros.explanation: That gives whole almonds some extra plant-compound value beyond the standard nutrient table.

pros.title: easy to use as a practical minimally processed snack
pros.explanation: Convenient and shelf-stable enough to fit many routines without needing much preparation.

cons.title: contains some anti-nutrients
cons.explanation: Phytates may reduce mineral absorption somewhat.

cons.title: easy to overeat calories quickly
cons.explanation: Energy density can add up fast in large handfuls.

cons.title: not suitable for everyone
cons.explanation: Tree nut allergy risk matters in practice.

sourceNotes: Sample data for FoodRanked test pack.
Values are approximate and should be replaced with canonical source data later.
